evidence: We currently leverage internally developed and third-party developed AI into certain aspects of our business and we anticipate that AI will become increasingly important to our operations in the future.

We currently leverage internally developed and third-party developed AI into certain aspects of our business

limitations: No quantified AI investment amounts, headcount, or capex figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named internal and third-party AI deployment without financial scale.
AI use cases are named (verification/fraud detection, product features) but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are disclosed; concreteness capped at 3.

Risk disclosure is company-specific with named mechanisms (regulatory compliance costs, bias/error in financial data, identity fraud, competitive disadvantage) justifying score 4, but no quantified risk exposure or named governance body appears in the excerpts.
